metrics.name: Seven-day activation rate
metrics.question: Does the new Android paywall and onboarding hint increase early activation?
metrics.eligible_population: Eligible non-test Android users exposed to the paywall variant.
metrics.numerator: Users with at least one feature_value_seen event within seven days after exposure.
metrics.denominator: Eligible exposed users assigned to the experiment variant.
validation_checks: one row per user_id in analysis
known_failure_modes: denominator includes users not exposed to the paywall
metric window starts at registration instead of exposure

metrics.name: Seven-day support ticket rate
metrics.question: Does the variant increase support burden shortly after exposure?
metrics.numerator: Users with at least one support ticket within seven days after exposure.
metrics.denominator: Eligible exposed users assigned to the experiment variant.
known_failure_modes: support telemetry loss differs by platform

metrics.name: Fourteen-day subscription cancellation rate
metrics.question: Does the variant increase early subscription cancellations?
metrics.eligible_population: Trial or subscribed users exposed to the experiment.
metrics.numerator: Users with a cancellation within fourteen days after exposure.
known_failure_modes: cancellation window is incomplete for late exposures

metrics.name: Seven-day refund rate
metrics.question: Does the variant increase refunds among paid orders?
metrics.eligible_population: Paid orders from eligible exposed users.
metrics.numerator: Refunded paid orders within seven days after exposure.
metrics.denominator: Paid orders from eligible exposed users.

metrics.name: Paywall to trial conversion
metrics.question: Does the new paywall move users into trial?
metrics.eligible_population: Eligible exposed users with a paywall view.
metrics.numerator: Users with trial_started within seven days after paywall exposure.
validation_checks: trial event is after paywall exposure
known_failure_modes: trial starts before exposure are counted

metrics.name: Seven-day realized revenue per exposed user
metrics.question: Does early realized revenue move in the same direction as activation?
metrics.numerator: Realized paid revenue minus refunds within seven days after exposure.
validation_checks: pending orders are excluded from realized revenue
known_failure_modes: pending orders are treated as revenue
